message:
fix: add crew and polecats to reserved polecat names to prevent session name collisions

ParseSessionName uses crew as a role marker and polecats as an address
component. Polecats with these names would be misidentified during
session name parsing. Added both to ReservedInfraAgentNames.

Fixes gt-9v2m9

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
